'''Twilight Squadron''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForce]] unit. It was one of the most reputable units of the infamous [[Eclipse Team]]. [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Sisquoc]] was the leader of Twilight Squadron, with [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Adazian Liebke]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Ma'w'shiye]] serving under him.
